name: service-triage-autoheal
description: Service triage workflow for one host. It separates read-only diagnosis, retryable repair planning, fallback log collection, and approval-gated remediation.

steps.title: Check target service state
steps.command: systemctl --no-pager --failed || true; systemctl --no-pager status TARGET_SERVICE || true
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would inspect failed units and the target service through vssh.

steps.title: Classify service failure and next actions
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would classify stale service noise versus real incident.

steps.title: Collect fallback logs when service check fails
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would collect logs only when the primary service check fails.

steps.title: Build host repair plan
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would build a repair plan without applying changes.

steps.title: Gate remediation apply
steps.dry_run_note: Real service quarantine, restart, removal, or repair must be explicitly approved.
